sections.paragraph:
verb לנוד

to move, wander, roam; shake; nod; lament

verb לנדות

to banish, expel; excommunicate, ostracize

verb נודה

be excommunicated, ostracized

verb להניד

to nod; move, shake; blink (eyelid); expel

verb הונד

be removed, expelled; transfered; shaken

verb לנדות (>>נידה)

to banish, expel; excommunicate, ostracize

adjective

wandering, moving
